subcodes.title: Words to Mr Newman, spoken on 1914-06-09
subcodes.first_line: The principal aim of this Movement is to investigate reality and promote the underlying unity of the world's religions. His Holiness Baha'o'llah suffered imprisonment
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social)
